caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is recording audio in a studio with grey acoustic foam walls. He wears a white t-shirt and black over-ear headphones. He sits in front of a silver condenser microphone mounted on a black boom arm, which has the text "Blue Voice" printed on it. Across the sequence, the man speaks while looking off-camera to his left. In the beginning, his expression is neutral as he starts to speak. As the clip progresses, his mouth opens wider and his eyebrows lift, showing an expression of surprise or intensity. He raises his right hand, gesturing with his fingers to emphasize his point. By the end, his mouth remains slightly open and his gaze is fixed on someone or something off-screen.
